# AddMediaMediaItemUnsupportedReason

**Type**

Reasons the media service can’t add the media item to the user’s library or to a playlist.

## Declaration

```swift
string AddMediaMediaItemUnsupportedReason
```

## Reporting a Problem

- **AddMediaMediaItemResolutionResult.Unsupported**: The reason your service can’t add the media item to the user’s library or to a playlist.
